headline: SLB Weighs Middle East Setbacks Against Subsea Expansion And Valuation Gap
summary: SLB (NYSE:SLB) reported significant operational disruptions in the Middle East tied to escalating geopolitical tensions, with activities suspended across several regional markets. The company issued a rare negative earnings preannouncement for Q1 2026, citing the direct impact on its core service lines. Separately, SLB’s OneSubsea unit agreed to acquire Envirex Group AS’s subsea business to expand its subsea technology portfolio and R&D capabilities. For you as an investor, this mix of...

headline: A Look At SLB (NYSE:SLB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And ChampionX Integration Story
summary: SLB stock snapshot and recent performance SLB (SLB) is drawing investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock around $44.72 following a 0.4% gain over the last session and a 4.6% decline over the past week. See our latest analysis for SLB. While the latest 0.36% 1 day share price return sits against a 4.65% 7 day decline and an 11.25% 30 day pullback, the 90 day share price return of 14.96% and 1 year total shareholder return of 12.13% suggest momentum has cooled recently...

headline: SLB warns of $0.09 EPS hit as Hormuz blockade shuts down Middle East flows
summary: Investing.com -- Global energy services giant Slb NV (NYSE:SLB) is bracing for a hit to its first-quarter earnings as escalating hostilities in the Middle East disrupt regional operations and effectively shut down the Strait of Hormuz.
